candidate_findings.evidence: The rendered control heading line shows AC-1 followed by POLICY AND PROCEDURES, boxed as a single heading region.

candidate_findings.evidence: The label Control: appears directly below the AC-1 heading at the expected indentation.

candidate_findings.evidence: The first list item begins with a. Develop, document, and disseminate... and wraps onto a second line.

candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted list text, nesting position, and bbox agree with the rendered page.

candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate accurately captures this list subitem and its line wrapping.

candidate_findings.evidence: The nested item (b) Is consistent with applicable laws... appears immediately below item (a).
candidate_findings.rationale: The list type, text, and bbox align with the rendered content.

candidate_findings.evidence: The item 2. Procedures to facilitate the implementation... is shown at the same nested level as item 1.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate correctly captures this list item and its visible wrapping.

candidate_findings.evidence: The item b. Designate an [Assignment: organization-defined official]... appears as a wrapped list item.
candidate_findings.rationale: The list classification and bounding region match the rendered body structure.

candidate_findings.evidence: The item c. Review and update the current access control: appears as a short list line.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate text and bbox match the visible list entry.

candidate_findings.evidence: The nested item 1. Policy [Assignment: organization-defined frequency]... is boxed below item c.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate is a correctly extracted nested list item with matching text and geometry.

candidate_findings.evidence: The nested item 2. Procedures [Assignment: organization-defined frequency]... appears below the policy item.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted list text, bbox, and rendered position agree.

candidate_findings.evidence: The Discussion paragraph begins after the list and spans multiple lines down the page.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted paragraph text is normalized correctly and the bbox covers the rendered discussion block.

candidate_findings.evidence: The Related Controls line appears below the discussion and includes IA-1, PM-9, PM-24, PS-8, SI-12.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate captures the rendered related-controls text in the correct location as a body text block.

candidate_findings.evidence: The References line appears near the bottom of the body and lists OMB A-130, SP 800-12, SP 800-30, SP 800-39, SP 800-100, and IR 7874.
candidate_findings.rationale: The reference preset, text, and bounding box agree with the rendered references line.
